# Envelope

## Summary

Structured JSON wrapper every Project Alpha CLI command writes to stdout on completion. Canonical source of final state.

## Why in the KB

Disambiguated from the *cryptographic* envelope (hosted-backup manifest+chunks). Engine architecture references it heavily.
